**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Yintai Electric Co., Ltd. presents an operational profile of an established, medium-scale electrical equipment distributor and construction contractor, definitively not a primary manufacturer. Despite being officially classified under 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturing' with an impressive 71.77 million RMB in fully paid-in capital, its business scope explicitly lists 'sales and sales services' for all its electrical products (switchgear, automation systems, etc.) without claiming any manufacturing capabilities. However, its robust workforce of 60 insured employees in 2024 and its registration as an unlisted Joint-Stock Company (股份有限公司) indicate substantial physical operations. These 60 employees are likely engaged in its other permitted scopes: 'construction engineering installation', 'freight forwarding', and operating a large-scale electrical equipment distribution and warehousing hub in Yuhuatai District.
